rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. CHUCK M. POST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LEM-RAY PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, CHUCK POST MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. The Court notes Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b)(". . . If summary adjudication is sought, whether separately or as an alternative to the motion for summary judgment, the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty must be stated specifically in the notice of motion and be repeated, verbatim, in the separate statement of undisputed material facts"). However, the Court finds that the motion should be DENIED on its merits. The clear language of the stipulation does not mandate that Plaintiffs file a motion as the only means of obtaining penalties in the event that a violation of the injunction occurred. (See Stipulated Injunction, 18:19-25; Stipulated Permanent Injunction, 5:9-12.)= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. MARIA T GUERRERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT MARIA GUERRERO, AMALIA GUERRERO, JOSE GUERRERO Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside Default Judgment And Entry Of Default DENIED. Defendants are not entitled to legal relief under CCP § 473(b) and Defendants have not sustained their burden that they are entitled to equitable relief.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA BARREL COMPANY LLC. VS. ALL PERSON CLAIMING ANY INTEREST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Verified Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BARREL COMPANY LLC. Motion For Leave To File Verified Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file the proposed second complaint by 4:00 pm on May 16, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JACK JAIR VS. DANNY SCHECHTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 15, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DANNY SCHECHTER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Defendant is to file an answer within 10 days of the entry of this order.= (501/CFH)
